title: Path Stage Ribbon
summary: Added a compact interactive stage ribbon under Mission Glance so route levels, gates, unlocks, the focused node, and future expansion slots are visible before opening the deeper Route module.
verification: python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_stage_ribbon.py -q failed before implementation because renderPathStageRibbon was missing.
python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_stage_ribbon.py -q failed again after runtime inspection until the ribbon and node heights were fixed.

Browser runtime: direct Command/Path route exposed the interactive Path Stage Ribbon after Mission Glance with one focused stage, nine total stage cards, eight focus buttons, bottom at 720px, and overflow 0.
